title: Vijaya Vilas Palace

overview.short: Vijaya Vilas Palace is a summer palace of Maharao of Kutch located on the beach of Mandvi in Kutch, Gujarat, India.

topPlaces.name: Mandvi
topPlaces.description: Mandvi is a beach town with a municipality in the Kachchh district (Kutch) of the Indian state of Gujarat. It was once a major port of the region and summer retreat for the Maharao (king) of the Cutch State.

topPlaces.name: Rukmavati River
topPlaces.description: The Rukmavati River is a south flowing river originating in the central Kutch District and empties into the Arabian Sea in the state of Gujarat. Mandvi, an ancient port town, is located on the banks of this river just at the mouth where it meets the Arabian Sea near the Gulf of Kachchh.

topPlaces.name: Nagalpur, Mandvi
topPlaces.description: Nagalpur(Mandvi) is a small village in Kutch district in the state of Gujarat, India. It comes under Mandvi taluka.

items.note: Mandvi is a beach town with a municipality in the Kachchh district (Kutch) of the Indian state of Gujarat. It was once a major port of the region and summer retreat for the Maharao (king) of the Cutch State.

The Rukmavati River is a south flowing river originating in the central Kutch District and empties into the Arabian Sea in the state of Gujarat. Mandvi, an ancient port town, is located on the banks of this river just at the mouth where it meets the Arabian Sea near the Gulf of Kachchh.
Nagalpur(Mandvi) is a small village in Kutch district in the state of Gujarat, India. It comes under Mandvi taluka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vijaya Vilas Palace?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vijaya Vilas Palace is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vijaya Vilas Palace?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jamnagar Airport (85 km) and the nearest railway station is Rajkot Junction (165 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vijaya Vilas Palace?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vijaya Vilas Palace at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vijaya Vilas Palace?
faq.a: Stays in Vijaya Vilas Palace start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vijaya Vilas Palace?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mandvi, Rukmavati River, Nagalpur, Mandvi.
